task: Using only the embedded packet, classify the privileged groups against the provided thresholds, recommend access changes, quantify residual risk, and produce two deliverables: conditional_access_drift.xlsx and id_governance_memo.md. The deliverables must include formulas or executable logic (spreadsheet formulas or pseudocode), intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, explicit uncertainty notes, sensitivity checks around controlling thresholds, and a final decision table labeling each group as pass/warn/fail/needs_review. Do not import external data or invent missing values; explicitly surface any unresolved assumptions.
